implementation.dedup_engine: 5-layer deterministic: original_id → URL → content_fingerprint → title_fingerprint → near_dup_fingerprint
implementation.extraction_engine: Rule-based: 15 assets, 6 entity types, 18 topics, anti-pattern filtering
implementation.clustering_engine: Cross-source scoring: assets(30) + topics(20) + title(25) + time(15) + entities(10); threshold=30
implementation.timeline_builder: Idempotent entry add; status change tracking; first_report/update/conflict types
implementation.relationship_graph: 6 relationship types; POSSIBLE_CONSEQUENCE always marked inferred=true
implementation.narrative_burst: Window-based topic burst detection; novelty ranking
implementation.export_contract: Stable JSON contract for W1 integration; no runtime UUIDs
implementation.static_renderer: CSP-secure HTML; no script tags; no db_path; no raw_json

limitations: Scoring defaults to HIGH_ATTENTION for NEW items — tuning needed in future iterations
Source independence heuristic uses domain grouping, not verified editorial independence
No vector DB or persistent storage — all in-memory per run
No streaming or real-time update — one-shot only
Clustering threshold (30/100) may need tuning for production
Asset extraction uses dictionary only — unknown symbols not detected
Topic extraction uses keyword rules — may miss nuanced coverage
Narrative burst is window-based, not detection-algorithm-based
